title: Alter Ego
content:

    In and out the courts of Time.

title: Aphrodite
content:
Not unremembering we pass our exile from the starry ways:

title: Prelude: By Still Waters
content:

title: The Grey Eros
content:
We are desert leagues apart;

    Chased the shadows from my brow.

title: The Twilight Of Earth

    There is no unimagined shore,
    No islet yet to venture on.

title: The Parting Of Ways
content:
The skies from black to pearly grey
    Had veered without a star or sun;
    Only a burning opal ray
    Fell on your brow when all was done.

title: Faintly we echo--like this spake the Shadow and like this the Glory.

title: Divine Visitation

    A new enchantment lights the ancient skies.
